Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Formulary File Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 2.2 5 

FORMULARY_*ID 

LABEL: Formulary Identification Number 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the unique identification number assigned to each formulary. Part D plans submit their 
formularies to C 

S and identify the drug products that are covered using the National Library of Medicine’s RxNorm Concept Unique 
Identifiers (RXCUIs). The same formulary may be used by more than
